code:
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Queued:Workflow Submitted
  Queued --> Running:Started First Step
  Queued --> Failed:Problem starting First Step
  Running --> InProgress:Succeeded Non-Terminal Step
  InProgress --> Running:Started Next Step
  Queued --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Completed:Succeeded Final Step
  Paused --> Running:Resumed by User
  Running --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Failed --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Failed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Cancelled --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Cancelled --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Completed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Queued --> Paused:Paused by User
  Paused --> Queued:Resumed by User

  Queued:queued
  Running:running
  Failed:failed
  InProgress:in_progress
  Cancelled:cancelled
  Completed:completed
  Paused:paused

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个EMR同步工作流的状态图，核心是从提交到最终完成的生命周期。初始状态叫Queued，然后用户可以随时取消或者暂停。
明白，Queued是起点。那从Queued出发，正常流程是直接进入Running，还是有中间状态？另外用户取消和暂停的权限要覆盖哪些状态？
Queued收到Workflow Submitted事件后进入Running。但Running之后要拆成两种情况：如果还有后续步骤，就先到InProgress，成功后再回到Running处理下一步；如果是最后一步成功了，直接到Completed。
好的，Queued到Running标记Started First Step，Running到InProgress标记Succeeded Non-Terminal Step，Running到Completed标记Succeeded Final Step。那InProgress怎么回到Running？
InProgress通过Started Next Step回到Running。另外失败处理也要有：Queued启动失败直接到Failed，Running执行失败也到Failed。Failed可以重试当前步骤回到InProgress，或者用户重新提交回到Queued。
确认一下：Failed有两个出口，Retrying Step到InProgress，Resubmitted by User到Queued。那Cancelled和Completed也能重新提交吗？
是的，Cancelled和Completed都可以通过Resubmitted by User回到Queued，形成闭环。暂停逻辑补充：Queued、Running、InProgress都能被用户暂停到Paused，Paused可以恢复回原来的状态——Running恢复回Running，Queued恢复回Queued。
完成。Paused到Running标记Resumed by User，Paused到Queued标记Resumed by User。所有状态标签用小写格式，Queued、running、failed、in_progress、cancelled、completed、paused。
